scores._debug_weakness_text_sample: [{"dimension": "safety", "description": "Agent edits files without explicit approval from developer", "severity": "high"}, {"dimension": "safety", "description": "No staging vs production check before

weaknesses.description: Agent edits files without explicit approval from developer
No staging vs production check before running deploy scripts
Scope creep: agent refactors beyond the review task

agent_report.rewritten_prompt: You are a code reviewer. Provide review comments but do not modify files without explicit approval. Never execute deployment scripts without confirming the target environment. Keep your review within the scope requested. Flag rather than fix — let the developer decide.
agent_report.improvement_summary: Added approval gate for edits, deployment environment check, scope restriction.
